socrates.summary: Founder of Western philosophy. He guided people toward truth through dialogue and questioning. Held that virtue is knowledge and that no one does wrong willingly.
famousQuotes: The unexamined life is not worth living
I know that I know nothing
Know thyself

plato.summary: Founder of the Theory of Forms, holding that true reality exists in the realm of ideas while the sensible world is only a copy. Founded the first Western academy.
famousQuotes: The visible world is the shadow of the intelligible world
Philosophers must become kings
The body is the prison of the soul

aristotle.summary: An encyclopedic philosopher who systematized logic, physics, biology, and more. Emphasized empirical observation and systematic inquiry.
famousQuotes: Man is by nature a political animal
Virtue is a habit
Plato is dear to me, but truth is dearer

confucius.summary: Founder of Confucianism, stressing benevolence, ritual propriety, and moral cultivation. Advocated education and self-cultivation to realize an ideal society.
famousQuotes: Do not impose on others what you would not choose for yourself
Learning without thought is labor lost
When three walk together, there must be a teacher among them

laozi.summary: Founder of Daoism, advocating alignment with nature and governance through non-action (wuwei). Held that forced human intervention disrupts the natural order.
famousQuotes: The Dao that can be told is not the eternal Dao
The highest good is like water
Act without acting, and nothing is left undone

mengzi.summary: A major Confucian thinker who developed Confucius's teachings, arguing for innate human goodness and benevolent government.
famousQuotes: Human nature is good, as water tends downward
The people are most important; the state next; the ruler least
Neither wealth nor rank can corrupt; neither poverty nor hardship can break; neither force nor power can bend

zhuangzi.summary: A leading Daoist who developed Laozi's thought, emphasizing spiritual freedom and the equality of all things.
famousQuotes: Life is finite, but knowledge is infinite
Heaven and earth were born with me; the ten thousand things and I are one
Zhuang Zhou dreams he is a butterfly

buddha.summary: Founder of Buddhism, teaching the Four Noble Truths and the Noble Eightfold Path as the way to liberation through practice.
famousQuotes: All is suffering
All phenomena are without self
All conditioned things are impermanent

descartes.summary: Father of modern philosophy. Developed rationalist method and held that certain knowledge comes through reason.
famousQuotes: I think, therefore I am
Doubt everything
Give me matter and motion and I will construct the universe

kant.summary: A culminating figure of German classical philosophy, advancing transcendental philosophy and the categorical imperative with major contributions to epistemology and ethics.
famousQuotes: Two things fill the mind with awe: the starry heavens above and the moral law within
Act so that you treat humanity always as an end, never merely as a means
Have courage to use your own understanding

hegel.summary: A master of German idealism who built a comprehensive dialectical system with lasting influence on later philosophy.
majorWorks: Elements of the Philosophy of Right
famousQuotes: What is rational is actual; what is actual is rational
The owl of Minerva spreads its wings only at dusk
History is the self-unfolding of absolute spirit

marx.summary: Founder of Marxism, formulating historical materialism and the theory of surplus value with vast impact on world history.
famousQuotes: Workers of the world, unite!
Philosophers have only interpreted the world; the point is to change it
History is nothing but the activity of people pursuing their ends

nietzsche.summary: A proto-existentialist who sharply criticized traditional morality and Christianity, advancing the Übermensch and the will to power.
famousQuotes: God is dead
What does not kill me makes me stronger
Man is a rope stretched between animal and Übermensch

heidegger.summary: One of the most important philosophers of the 20th century, exploring the meaning of being with major contributions to phenomenology and existentialism.
famousQuotes: Human being is being-toward-death
Language is the house of being
Dasein is always my Dasein

sartre.summary: A leading existentialist emphasizing radical freedom and responsibility, with wide influence on 20th-century thought.
famousQuotes: Existence precedes essence
Hell is other people
Man is condemned to be free

foucault.summary: A major postmodern thinker studying power, knowledge, and subjectivity, with deep influence on contemporary thought.
famousQuotes: Knowledge is power
It is not people who create discourse; discourse creates people
We should be wary of what appears to liberate us
